definitions: Cut (a woman's hair) into a bob.
Deceive (someone) with false hopes or promises.
Try to catch (an object) with the mouth.
Make a quick, short bow or curtsy.
examples: The apple bobbed in the water.
She decided to bob her hair.
He felt bobbed by their empty promises.
They bobbed for apples at the party.
She bobbed a curtsy to the queen.
